signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability are highly likely to force catch knockouts against running backs.
Defenders with this ability can apply pressure to the quarterback from a greater distance.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move.
Blockers with this ability are almost guaranteed to win any double team block they are engaged in
Players with this ability can detect user-controlled defenders before the snap; as well as 3rd and 4th down blitzers. Can be bluffed.

signatureAbility.signatureActivationDescription: Make consecutive passes for 5+ yards in air
signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Many passers use a combination of mobility and aggressiveness to make big plays. When they enter the zone, they have perfect accuracy while throwing on the run.
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful truck animations and a larger timing window for perfect trucks.
Passers with this ability can make all hot route and blocking adjustments twice as fast (excluding audibles).
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable spin animations.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in deep zone coverage, 20+ yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Defenders with this ability generally react much faster to receiver cut moves when in man coverage and outside the numbers
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Shutdown defenders have the talent to erase receivers from the game. When they enter the zone, their coverage is tighter and interceptions are more frequent on contested catches.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
